title: jasminum cordatulum
intro: Jasminum cordatulum, also known as the small white jasmine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae, native to tropical Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Jasminum cordatulum include its potential to reduce stress, improve sleep, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
